query:
SELECT entityType, entityId, COUNT(*) as total, ROUND(AVG(rating),1) as media,
  SUM(CASE WHEN rating >= 4 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as positivas,
  SUM(CASE WHEN rating = 3 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as normales
FROM reviews
GROUP BY entityType, entityId
ORDER BY entityType, entityId;

SELECT COUNT(*) as total_resenas FROM reviews;

  SUM(CASE WHEN rating >= 4 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as positivas,
  SUM(CASE WHEN rating = 3 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as normales

SELECT COUNT(*) as total_resenas FROM reviews;
